name: Daft Punk
bio: Daft Punk built one of electronic music's most commercially durable catalogs, balancing underground credibility with crossover pop reach.
notable_for: Helmet-era visual identity, festival-scale dance records, and cross-generational catalog appeal.
career_highlight: Even after retirement, their songs remain staples of streaming, sync, and catalog discovery.
revenue_drivers: Streaming stays strong because the catalog works across pop, dance, and nostalgia playlists.
Licensing remains valuable thanks to their distinctive sound and brand recognition.
Catalog sales and reissues continue to monetize the duo after retirement.
